description: Create comprehensive multi-panel provenance figure summarizing all evidence for GO:0070991 annotation
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(20, 16))
fig.suptitle('Comprehensive Evidence: Drosophila Mcad (Q9VSA3) — GO:0070991\nMedium-chain fatty acyl-CoA dehydrogenase activity', 
             fontsize=15, fontweight='bold', y=0.99)

# Create grid layout
gs = fig.add_gridspec(3, 3, hspace=0.35, wspace=0.3)

# ============ Panel A: Cross-subfamily identity ============
ax1 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 0])
subfamilies = ['MCAD', 'SCAD', 'LCAD', 'VLCAD']
identities = [69.08, 37.81, 31.83, 32.69]
colors = ['#e74c3c', '#3498db', '#2ecc71', '#f39c12']
bars = ax1.bar(subfamilies, identities, color=colors, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.8)
bars[0].set_hatch('///')
bars[0].set_edgecolor('darkred')
bars[0].set_linewidth(2.5)
ax1.set_ylabel('Identity to Dmel Mcad (%)', fontsize=10)
ax1.set_title('A. Cross-Subfamily Identity', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_ylim(0, 82)
for bar, val in zip(bars, identities):
    ax1.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2., val + 1, f'{val:.0f}%', 
             ha='center', va='bottom', fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)
ax1.annotate('', xy=(0.15, 69.08), xytext=(0.15, 37.81),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='<->', color='black', lw=2))
ax1.text(-0.15, 53, 'Δ31%', ha='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='darkred')

# ============ Panel B: Active site residue conservation ============
ax2 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 1])
categories = ['Catalytic\nGlu', 'FAD\nbinding\n(7 res)', 'Substrate\nbinding\n(7 res)', 'All key\nresidues\n(15 res)']
identical = [1, 7, 6, 14]
total = [1, 7, 7, 15]
similar = [0, 0, 1, 1]  # F/L is similar
pct_ident = [i/t*100 for i, t in zip(identical, total)]
pct_simil = [(i+s)/t*100 for i, s, t in zip(identical, similar, total)]

bars_i = ax2.bar(categories, pct_ident, color='#27ae60', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5, label='Identical')
bars_s = ax2.bar(categories, [s/t*100 for s, t in zip(similar, total)], bottom=pct_ident,
                 color='#f1c40f', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5, label='Conservative')
ax2.set_ylim(0, 115)
ax2.set_ylabel('Conservation (%)', fontsize=10)
ax2.set_title('B. Active Site Conservation\n(vs Human ACADM)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax2.legend(fontsize=8, loc='lower right')
for bar, i, s, t in zip(bars_i, identical, similar, total):
    ax2.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2., (i+s)/t*100 + 2, 
             f'{i+s}/{t}', ha='center', va='bottom', fontweight='bold', fontsize=10)

# ============ Panel C: Active site geometry correlation ============
ax3 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 2])
dists_d = [8.91, 11.27, 11.54, 11.34, 10.62, 6.80, 37.77, 40.81, 41.54, 38.33, 37.19, 27.99, 29.79, 30.50]
dists_h = [8.87, 11.26, 11.52, 11.28, 10.83, 6.89, 37.87, 40.85, 41.51, 38.46, 37.32, 27.99, 29.82, 30.49]

ax3.scatter(dists_h, dists_d, c='#e74c3c', s=80, edgecolors='black', zorder=5, linewidths=0.5)
# Perfect correlation line
line_range = np.linspace(5, 45, 100)
ax3.plot(line_range, line_range, 'k--', alpha=0.3, label='y = x')
ax3.set_xlabel('Human ACADM (Å)', fontsize=10)
ax3.set_ylabel('Dmel Mcad (Å)', fontsize=10)
ax3.set_title('C. Active Site Geometry\n(CA distances from catalytic Glu)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax3.text(10, 40, f'r = 1.0000\nMean Δ = 0.06 Å', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='orange'))
ax3.set_xlim(4, 45)
ax3.set_ylim(4, 45)
ax3.set_aspect('equal')

# ============ Panel D: Multi-species identity ============
ax4 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 0])
species = ['Human', 'Mouse', 'Rat']
multi_id = [69.08, 69.30, 68.82]
bars4 = ax4.barh(species, multi_id, color=['#9b59b6', '#8e44ad', '#7d3c98'], 
                  edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5, height=0.5)
ax4.set_xlim(60, 75)
ax4.set_xlabel('Identity to Dmel Mcad (%)', fontsize=10)
ax4.set_title('D. MCAD Ortholog Conservation\n(Bilateria)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
for bar, val in zip(bars4, multi_id):
    ax4.text(val + 0.2, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2., f'{val:.1f}%', 
             va='center', fontweight='bold', fontsize=10)

# ============ Panel E: AlphaFold confidence at functional sites ============
ax5 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 1])
residues = ['Glu397\n(cat)', 'S163', 'W187', 'I188', 'T189', 'D274', 'R277', 
            'R302', 'K303', 'T304', 'H312', 'Q313', 'Q370', 'I371', 'F372']
plddt = [96.6, 95.3, 98.6, 98.8, 98.7, 93.8, 97.7, 98.4, 98.6, 98.4, 98.8, 98.6, 98.9, 98.9, 98.8]

colors5 = ['#e74c3c'] + ['#3498db']*4 + ['#27ae60']*6 + ['#f39c12']*4
bars5 = ax5.barh(range(len(residues)), plddt, color=colors5, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.3, height=0.7)
ax5.set_yticks(range(len(residues)))
ax5.set_yticklabels(residues, fontsize=8)
ax5.set_xlim(90, 100)
ax5.set_xlabel('pLDDT Score', fontsize=10)
ax5.set_title('E. AlphaFold Confidence\nat Functional Residues', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax5.axvline(x=90, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.5)
ax5.text(90.5, 14.5, '→ All ≥ 93.8\n(Very High)', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='darkgreen')

legend5 = [mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#e74c3c', label='Catalytic'),
           mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#3498db', label='Substrate'),
           mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#27ae60', label='FAD'),
           mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#f39c12', label='Substrate (C-term)')]
ax5.legend(handles=legend5, fontsize=7, loc='lower right')

# ============ Panel F: Evidence convergence summary ============
ax6 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 2])
evidence_lines = [
    'IBA (PAINT/PANTHER)',
    'IMP (PMID:29563254)',
    'IEA (InterPro/EC)',
    'CDD cd01157',
    'InterPro IPR034180',
    'PANTHER SF2',
    'Seq identity (69%)',
    'Active site (95%)',
    'Geometry (r=1.00)',
    'Cross-subfam (Δ31%)',
    'Multi-species (4 spp)',
    'AlphaFold (pLDDT≥94)',
]
evidence_types = ['GO annotation', 'GO annotation', 'GO annotation',
                  'Domain classifier', 'Domain classifier', 'Domain classifier',
                  'Sequence analysis', 'Sequence analysis', 'Structural analysis',
                  'Sequence analysis', 'Sequence analysis', 'Structural analysis']
type_colors = {'GO annotation': '#e74c3c', 'Domain classifier': '#3498db', 
               'Sequence analysis': '#27ae60', 'Structural analysis': '#f39c12'}

y_pos = range(len(evidence_lines))
colors6 = [type_colors[t] for t in evidence_types]
bars6 = ax6.barh(y_pos, [1]*len(evidence_lines), color=colors6, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.3, height=0.7)
ax6.set_yticks(y_pos)
ax6.set_yticklabels(evidence_lines, fontsize=8)
ax6.set_xticks([])
ax6.set_title('F. Converging Evidence Lines\n(All support GO:0070991)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
for i, bar in enumerate(bars6):
    ax6.text(0.5, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2., '✓ SUPPORTS', 
             ha='center', va='center', fontweight='bold', fontsize=8, color='white')

legend6 = [mpatches.Patch(facecolor=c, label=t) for t, c in type_colors.items()]
ax6.legend(handles=legend6, fontsize=7, loc='lower right')

# ============ Panel G: GO Decision Table ============
ax7 = fig.add_subplot(gs[2, :])
ax7.axis('off')

table_data = [
    ['GO Term', 'Current Evidence', 'Recommendation', 'Confidence'],
    ['GO:0070991\n(MF: MCAD activity)', 'IBA + IMP + IEA\n(3 independent lines)', 'RETAIN — strongly supported\nby sequence, structure, phylogeny', 'Very High'],
    ['GO:0003995\n(MF: ACAD activity)', 'ISS + IEA', 'RETAIN as parent term\n(could upgrade ISS→IMP)', 'High'],
    ['GO:0006635\n(BP: FA β-oxidation)', 'ISS + IEA + IMP', 'RETAIN — consistent\nwith enzymatic function', 'High'],
    ['GO:0005759\n(CC: mito matrix)', 'IEA + EXP', 'RETAIN — experimentally\nvalidated (PMID:29563254)', 'Very High'],
]

table = ax7.table(cellText=table_data[1:], colLabels=table_data[0],
                   loc='center', cellLoc='center',
                   colWidths=[0.2, 0.25, 0.3, 0.15])
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(9)
table.scale(1, 2.0)

# Style header
for j in range(4):
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#2c3e50')
    table[0, j].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')

# Style confidence column
conf_colors = {'Very High': '#27ae60', 'High': '#3498db'}
for i in range(1, 5):
    conf = table_data[i][3]
    table[i, 3].set_facecolor(conf_colors.get(conf, 'white'))
    table[i, 3].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')

ax7.set_title('G. GO Annotation Decision Table', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

plt.savefig('comprehensive_provenance.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Comprehensive provenance figure saved.")
